response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has a broad and legitimate engineering career spanning roughly 20 years, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Stripe. However, the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI expertise, strategic advisory experience, and ideally an advanced degree in an AI-related field — none of which Bogdan clearly demonstrates. His background is predominantly that of a hands-on senior/staff-level full-stack engineer, and his AI involvement is recent and narrow rather than foundational or thought-leadership-grade. There is no evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping AI platform strategy at scale, or publishing/presenting recognized AI work.
strengths: 20-year career across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering demonstrates genuine technical breadth
Current Stripe role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework contributions, showing real-world agentic AI builder experience
Entrepreneurial track record through open-source GIS platform, community workshops, and conference talks shows initiative beyond day-to-day employment
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in AI or a related field; education is a BS in Computer Science and a Fine Arts bachelor's
Seniority is Staff Engineer level, not Director-level IC; no demonstrated strategic advisory, executive stakeholder influence, or external thought-leadership at the scale the role requires
AI experience is recent and narrow (MCP tooling since April 2025); no track record of recognized AI products, platforms, or publications that would justify a Principal AI Strategy role
